sourceMethod: source scan of process.env usage under avmatrix/src plus direct source reads for defaults and parsing behavior

variables.name: AVMATRIX_HOME
variables.behavior: Overrides global AVmatrix home directory; default is <os.homedir()>/.avmatrix.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_NO_GITIGNORE
variables.behavior: Presence/truthiness skips .gitignore parsing but still reads .avmatrixignore.

variables.name: NODE_OPTIONS
variables.behavior: Analyze relaunch path appends the heap flag to existing NODE_OPTIONS; user-facing errors also instruct heap/stack override.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_VERBOSE
variables.behavior: CLI --verbose sets value to 1. Runtime treats value 1 as verbose for ingestion/wiki diagnostics.

variables.name: DEBUG
variables.behavior: Truthy value enables additional stack logging for server/serve errors.

variables.name: NODE_ENV
variables.behavior: development enables diagnostic logs; production suppresses some development assertions.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_DEBUG
variables.behavior: Truthy value logs max-fixpoint diagnostics during type-env iteration.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_MAX_PROCESSES
variables.behavior: Positive integer overrides settings.maxExecutionFlows; invalid/unset falls back to repo settings then default cap 700.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_SCOPE_RESOLUTION_WORKERS
variables.behavior: auto/unset enables automatic worker use. 1/true/yes/on/force forces workers. 0/false/no/off or unknown disables workers.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_SCOPE_RESOLUTION_WORKER_COUNT
variables.behavior: Positive integer overrides worker count; invalid/unset lets runtime choose.

variables.name: INGESTION_EMIT_SCOPES
variables.behavior: Truthy values true/1/yes emit lexical scope nodes and scope-tree edges for diagnostics.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_SHADOW_MODE
variables.behavior: Truthy values true/1/yes enable dual-run shadow parity accumulation and optional persistence.

variables.name: REGISTRY_PRIMARY_<LANG>
variables.behavior: Dynamic per-language flag. Truthy values true/1/yes flip that language to registry-primary call resolution.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_EMBEDDING_URL
variables.behavior: Together with AVMATRIX_EMBEDDING_MODEL enables OpenAI-compatible HTTP embedding mode; trailing slash trimmed.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_EMBEDDING_MODEL
variables.behavior: Model name sent to the HTTP embedding endpoint; required with AVMATRIX_EMBEDDING_URL for HTTP mode.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_EMBEDDING_DIMS
variables.behavior: Positive integer embedding dimension. HTTP mode validates returned vector length. LadybugDB schema defaults to 384 when unset.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_EMBEDDING_API_KEY
variables.behavior: Bearer token for HTTP embedding endpoint; default literal is unused.

variables.name: HF_HOME
variables.behavior: Overrides HuggingFace/transformers cache directory; default falls back to HOME/.cache/huggingface.

variables.name: HOME
variables.behavior: Used only to form the default HuggingFace cache directory when HF_HOME is unset.

variables.name: ORT_LOG_LEVEL
variables.behavior: If unset, module sets it to 3 before transformers imports ONNX Runtime to suppress native warnings.

variables.name: CUDA_PATH
variables.behavior: Linux CUDA fallback probe searches CUDA_PATH for libcublasLt.so.12 when ldconfig is unavailable.

variables.name: LD_LIBRARY_PATH
variables.behavior: Linux CUDA fallback probe searches LD_LIBRARY_PATH for libcublasLt.so.12 when ldconfig is unavailable.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_CODEX_EXECUTABLE
variables.behavior: Overrides Codex executable. If configured path ends with .js on Windows, Node executes that JS file directly.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_SESSION_EXECUTION_MODE
variables.behavior: sandbox/sandboxed maps to sandboxed mode. bypass maps to bypass mode. Default is bypass on Windows and sandboxed elsewhere.

variables.name: ComSpec
variables.behavior: Preferred Windows command shell for native Codex launch.

variables.name: SystemRoot
variables.behavior: Used to build cmd.exe fallback path when ComSpec is unset.
variables.default: C:\Windows fallback when both SystemRoot and windir are unset

variables.name: windir
variables.behavior: Secondary Windows root fallback for cmd.exe path.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_API_KEY
variables.behavior: First-priority env API key for wiki LLM requests, after explicit override.

variables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
variables.behavior: Second-priority env API key fallback for wiki LLM requests.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_LLM_BASE_URL
variables.behavior: Env override for OpenAI-compatible chat completions base URL.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_MODEL
variables.behavior: Env override for wiki LLM model.

variables.name: AVMATRIX_AZURE_API_VERSION
variables.behavior: Azure api-version query parameter fallback for Azure OpenAI endpoints.

variables.name: IMPACT_MAX_CHUNKS
variables.behavior: Integer chunk count for impact result batching; default 10 means max items 1000.

variables.name: npm_execpath
variables.behavior: Used by /api/info to infer npx/runtime install context.

variables.name: npm_config_prefix
variables.behavior: Used by /api/info to infer npx/runtime install context.

conversionRules: Go runtime must preserve each env name exactly unless a later explicit contract migration is recorded.
Truthiness parsers are contract surface: AVMATRIX_SHADOW_MODE and REGISTRY_PRIMARY_<LANG> accept true/1/yes only.
HTTP embedding mode is enabled only when both AVMATRIX_EMBEDDING_URL and AVMATRIX_EMBEDDING_MODEL are set.
Local embedding defaults are model Snowflake/snowflake-arctic-embed-xs, 384 dimensions, and auto device fallback.
Session execution mode default differs by platform and must remain bypass on Windows, sandboxed elsewhere.
Secrets are never snapshotted; only variable names, defaults, and parsing rules are frozen.
